title: Bootstrap Requirements And Decisions Hard Cutover Refresh planning chain
summary: Bootstraps the initial planning chain for Requirements And Decisions Hard Cutover Refresh.
scope_items: Publish the initial PRD, feature design, and implementation plan chain.
Publish the matching acceptance contract and planning-baseline evidence.
Establish the first tracked task for the initiative.
done_when_items: The planning chain exists under canonical planning paths.
The acceptance contract and planning-baseline evidence exist under canonical control-plane paths.
The bootstrap task is visible through the derived coordination surfaces.
